name: rabbit-spec
summary: Owner of the rabbit workflow's spec-lifecycle skills. Hosts rabbit-spec-create (drafts initial spec bodies via the read-only rabbit-spec-creator subagent) and rabbit-spec-update (revises existing specs; absorbed from rabbit-feature/rabbit-feature-spec).
deprecation_criterion: when Claude Code exposes native spec-lifecycle skills that supersede this feature
spec_no_change_reason: Spec amended this cycle (bumped 1.10.0 -> 1.11.0): #633 — the specs/->docs/ flat-spec migration is complete (all 11 features carry docs/spec.md; zero use specs/spec.md or docs/spec/spec.md), so the now-dead triple-fallback resolution was deleted. spec.md Inv 6 collapsed to canonical flat docs/ only; both SKILL.md layout sections and every Step 1/3/4 path reference collapsed to docs/spec.md; contract.md never-clause simplified. Test test-spec-path-layout-dual-read.py renamed to test-spec-path-layout-canonical.py and inverted to assert the SKILLs name docs/spec.md ONLY (no specs/ or docs/spec/ fallback). Behaviour for the canonical path is unchanged.
